scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'if [ "$RENDER" != "true" ]; then rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac; fi'
scripts.postinstall: if [ "$RENDER" = "true" ]; then npm install -g pnpm@10 && pnpm install --ignore-scripts && BASE_PATH=/ PORT=3000 pnpm --filter @workspace/myclasses run build; fi
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
